name: tokenless
description: Standalone visible-session bridge and isolated direct AI provider CLI.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspaces --if-present && npm run build:scripts
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && TOKENLESS_E2E=1 node --test test/**/*.e2e.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:live-ambient-codex: npm run build:js --workspace tokenless && TOKENLESS_LIVE_AMBIENT_CODEX=1 node --test --test-concurrency=1 test/live-ambient-codex.e2e.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:live-direct: npm run build:js --workspace tokenless && TOKENLESS_LIVE_DIRECT=1 node --test test/live-direct-api.e2e.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:live-managed-codex: npm run build:js --workspace tokenless && TOKENLESS_LIVE_MANAGED_CODEX=1 node --test test/live-managed-codex.e2e.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:live-chatgpt: npm run build && TOKENLESS_LIVE_CHATGPT=1 node --test test/live-chatgpt.e2e.mjs
